fields.name: reference
fields.label: Default Content Fragment
fields.description: The default content fragment to display. At runtime, Adobe Target may replace this with a personalized offer.

fields.name: contentFragmentVariation
fields.label: Selected Variation
fields.description: Persisted variation for publish; leave empty for master.

fields.name: mbox
fields.label: Target Mbox Name
fields.description: The Adobe Target mbox name for personalization. Leave as 'global' for the default activity.
